hypothesis: A 25-record ExECT S0/S1 diagnostic validation cap tests whether v4.4 diagnosis co-list and seizure-surface bridges generalize beyond the regression slice without changing scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic validation cap is a gating check for ExECT S0/S1 architecture work; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Medication temporality is intentionally excluded from benchmark-facing metrics for this baseline.
Evidence quote support should be reported both overall and split between exact model quotes and ellipsis bridge repairs.
